sidebar.show_playable_only_tooltip: Rodyti tik tuos, kurie gali būti žaidžiami

sidebar.create_collection_description: Sukurti naują kolekciją, kad suorganizuoti savo žaidimus
sidebar.install_decky_plugin_message: Bus atsisiųstas ir įdiegtas Hydra plugin skirtas Decky Loader. Gali būti reikalingos administratoriaus teisės. Tęsti?

header.version_available_install: Versija {{version}} pasiekiama. Spustelėkite čia, kad paleistumėte iš naujo ir ją įdiegtumėte.
header.version_available_download: Versija {{version}} pasiekiama. Spustelėkite čia, kad ją atsisiųstumėte.
header.scan_games_description:
Bus skenuojami jūsų diskai ieškant žinomų žaidimų vykdomųjų failų.
Tai gali užtrukti kelias minutes.
header.scan_games_result: Rasta {{found}} iš {{total}} žaidimų be nurodyto vykdomojo failo kelio
header.scan_games_no_results: Nepavyko rasti nė vieno įdiegto žaidimo.
header.scan_games_in_progress_hint: Galite užverti šį langą. Baigus paiešką gausite pranešimą.
header.scan_games_folders_hint_manual: Pridėkite bent vieną aplanką, kuriame bus ieškoma žaidimų.
header.scan_games_detection_warning: Aptikimas remiasi bendruomenės prižiūrimu žinomų žaidimų sąrašu, todėl kai kurie žaidimai gali būti nerasti.

game_details.wine_prefix_description: Wine prefixas, naudojamas šiam žaidimui paleisti

settings.default_proton_version_description: Select the Proton version used by Auto mode when a game has no custom override
settings.console_cores_description: Pick a console to set up emulation, ROM folders, and review your library. Hydra never downloads or distributes ROMs or BIOS files. Your library, your responsibility.
settings.emulation_description: Pick a console to set up emulation, ROM folders, and review your library.
settings.emulation_disclaimer: Hydra never downloads or distributes ROMs or BIOS files. Your library, your responsibility.
settings.hide_classics_bookmark: Hide the Hydra Classics bookmark on game pages

settings.setup_required_hint: Please complete a {{system}} setup in order to launch games.
settings.no_rom_folder_hint: Add a ROM folder to start scanning your {{system}} games.
settings.emulator_section_description: Hydra can find your emulator automatically, or manually update the file path below.
settings.supported_emulators_description: Hydra currently supports {{name}} for this system. We'll keep working on adding more emulators.
settings.executable_path_description: Hydra can automatically detect your emulator, or you can manually specify the file path below.
settings.roms_detected_description: Your local {{system}} catalogue, kept in sync with LaunchBox.
settings.no_roms_detected: No ROMs detected yet. Add a ROM folder and rescan.
settings.rom_folders_section_description: Hydra only scans folders you add here. Your ROMs stay on your machine.
settings.memory_cards_section_description: Saves found on your PCSX2 memory cards. Files stay on your machine.
settings.memory_cards_section_description_ps1: Saves found on your DuckStation memory cards. Files stay on your machine.

settings.no_memory_cards_ps1: No memory card saves detected yet. Scan to find your DuckStation saves.
settings.memcard_scan_intro: Reading saves and matching them to LaunchBox covers.
settings.forget_memcard_save_description: {{name}} will be removed from Hydra's list. The save on your memory card is untouched.
settings.forget_memcard_card_description: All saves detected on {{name}} will be removed from Hydra's list. The memory card file is untouched.
settings.cloud_saves_section_description: Game saves backed up to Hydra Cloud. Restore writes a save back into one of your memory cards.
settings.game_no_saves_found: We haven't found any saves for this game in your memory cards.
settings.game_no_memcards_description: You haven't added any memory cards yet. Add one to find this game's saves and back them up to the cloud.
settings.cloud_subscription_required: A Hydra Cloud subscription is required to back up and restore emulator saves.
settings.no_cloud_saves: No cloud saves yet. Back up a save from the Memory cards section above.
settings.cloud_backup_success: Save backed up to Hydra Cloud
settings.cloud_backup_failed: Could not back up this save
settings.cloud_restore_title: Restore save to a memory card
settings.cloud_restore_description: Choose a memory card to write this save into. The card will be modified — a backup copy is made automatically.
settings.cloud_restore_no_cards: No memory cards detected. Pick a card file to restore into.
settings.cloud_restore_success: Save restored to your memory card
settings.cloud_delete_description: {{name}} will be permanently removed from Hydra Cloud. This cannot be undone.
settings.cloud_rename_description: Give this save a label so it's easy to recognise.
settings.emulator_invalid_executable: That file is not a valid emulator executable. Pick the emulator program.
settings.folder_already_added: This folder is already in your library
settings.executable_missing_hint: The {{name}} file moved or was deleted. Re-detect it or set a new path.
settings.bios_note: BIOS files are managed by {{name}}. Hydra cannot install BIOS for you. Set them up inside {{name}}.
settings.remove_rom_folder_description: {{path}} will no longer be scanned. The folder and its files stay on your disk.
settings.setup_step_find_intro: Hydra needs to know where {{name}} is installed so it can launch your games. We tried to detect it automatically.
settings.setup_emulator_not_found_hint: Click Browse manually to point Hydra at the executable.
settings.setup_download_intro: In order to download {{name}}, use the official sources below.
settings.setup_download_desc: Get the latest official {{name}} build from the developers.
settings.setup_download_firmware_desc: Download Sony's official firmware from PlayStation.
settings.setup_firmware_intro_1: PS3 emulation needs Sony's official firmware.
settings.setup_firmware_intro_2: Hydra can't include or download it for you.
settings.setup_firmware_step_2: In RPCS3: File → Install Firmware → choose the .PUP file
settings.setup_firmware_recheck_note: We'll check RPCS3 again when you continue.
settings.setup_rom_intro: Point Hydra at the folder where you keep your {{system}} ISOs or game directories. Hydra only scans the folders you choose.
settings.setup_rom_choose_hint: Choose where you keep your {{system}} game files.
settings.setup_rom_subfolder_hint: Useful if you organize games into per-title folders.
settings.setup_rom_yml_registered_one: {{count}} game is already registered in RPCS3 and will be matched automatically.
settings.setup_rom_yml_registered_other: {{count}} games are already registered in RPCS3 and will be matched automatically.
settings.setup_scan_intro: Matching your files to the LaunchBox catalogue. This usually takes under a minute.
settings.setup_scan_keep_open: Feel free to leave this open, we'll notify you when it's done.
settings.setup_done_body_one: We added {{count}} game to your library and matched it to LaunchBox covers and metadata.
settings.setup_done_body_other: We added {{count}} games to your library and matched them to LaunchBox covers and metadata.
settings.setup_done_tip: Tip: Add another ROM folder anytime from {{system}} settings.
settings.remove_emulator_description: Hydra will forget the {{name}} path and all mapped ROM folders. The emulator itself and your ROM files stay on disk. You can re-run setup afterwards.

binary_not_found_modal.title: Programos neįdiegtos
binary_not_found_modal.description: umu-run arba Wine paleidžiamieji failai nebuvo rasti jūsų sistemoje
binary_not_found_modal.instructions: Įdiekite umu-run arba Wine ant savo Linux sistemos, kad žaidimo diegimo programa galėtų pasileisti

classics_onboarding.title: Sveiki atvykę į Hydra Classics
classics_onboarding.step1_body: Jūsų PS1, PS2 ir PS3 biblioteka, organizuota, suderinta ir paruošta paleidimui. Hydra Classics paverčia jūsų ROM aplankus į tvarkingą katalogą su viršeliais, metaduomenims ir paleidimu vienu paspaudimu.
classics_onboarding.step2_body: Hydra nelaiko, nesiunčia ir neplatina ROM ar BIOS failų. Tiesiog nurodykite mums aplankus, kuriuose laikote savo žaidimus, ir viskas. Jūsų failai lieka jūsų įrenginyje.
classics_onboarding.step3_body: Hydra Classics veikia su DuckStation, PCSX2 ir RPCS3. Paleiskite bet kurį atpažintą žaidimą vienu spustelėjimu. PS2 žaidėjai, naudojantys Hydra Cloud, gali netgi kurti atminties kortelių atsargines kopijas skirtinguose įrenginiuose.

user_profile.manual_playtime_tooltip: Šis žaidimo laikas buvo atnaujintas rankiniu būdu
user_profile.no_recent_activity_description: Pastaruoju metu nežaidėte jokių žaidimų. Laikas tai pakeisti!
user_profile.sign_out_modal_text: Jūsų biblioteka yra susieta su dabartine paskyra. Atsijungus, biblioteka nebebus matoma ir jokie progresai nebus išsaugoti. Tęsti atsijungimą?
user_profile.privacy_hint: Norėdami pakeisti, kas gali tai matyti, eikite į <0>Nustatymus</0>
user_profile.displayname_min_length: Vardaas turi būti bent 3 simbolių ilgio
user_profile.displayname_max_length: Vardas turi būti ne ilgesnis kaip 50 simbolių
user_profile.crop_profile_image_stage: Profilio paveikslėlio apkarpymo sritis. Norėdami judinti vaizdą, naudokite rodyklių klavišus.
user_profile.crop_profile_image_description: Vilkite vaizdą, kad pakeistumėte jo poziciją, tada naudokite mastelį dydžiui keisti.
user_profile.remove_banner_confirmation: Ar tikrai norite pašalinti savo profilio viršelį? Bet kada galėsite pasirinkti naują.
user_profile.error_adding_friend: Nepavyko išsiųsti kvietimo draugauti. Patikrinkite draugo kodą.

library.no_games_description: Norėdami pradėti, pridėkite žaidimų iš katalogo arba juos atsisiųskite
library.manual_playtime_tooltip: Šio žaidimo laikas buvo atnaujintas rankiniu būdu
library.delete_collection_description: Ar tikrai norite ištrinti "{{collectionName}}"? Žaidimai liks jūsų bibliotekoje ir bus pašalinti tik šioje kolekcijoje.
library.empty_favorites_description: Pažymėkite žaidimus kaip mėgstamus, kad jie būtų lengvai pasiekiami čia.
library.empty_collection_description: Dešiniuoju pelės mygtuku spustelėkite bet kurį žaidimą, atidarykite „Kolekcija“ ir pridėkite jį čia.
library.importing_classics_description: Nuskaitome jūsų ROM aplankus, kad atkurtume klasikinius žaidimus. Tai gali šiek tiek užtrukti.
